Role.description: The type of thought-act a message performs.
Role.title: Role

TokenCost.description:
Tokens spent producing a single message.

Required on every non-human message so the swarm can compute its own
operating cost, rank cheap-but-good solutions, and detect runaway
agents. Human messages set this to ``None``.

model.description: Model identifier used for billing — may differ from ``Message.model`` if routed through a gateway.
model.title: Model

TokenCost.title: TokenCost

description: A single append-only entry in the swarm log.

role.description: Type of thought-act this message performs.

reply_to.description: Parent message id — drives the reasoning graph edges.
reply_to.title: Reply To

tags.description: Routing and filtering hints; used by the mention router and semantic filter.
tags.title: Tags

confidence.description: Author's self-rated confidence in this message (0-1).
confidence.title: Confidence

token_cost.description: Tokens consumed producing this message. ``None`` for human authors.

chain_of_thought.description: Author's private reasoning, e.g. concatenated thinking blocks from the Claude transcript. ``None`` for humans and for agents that do not expose their CoT. See ADR-0006.
chain_of_thought.title: Chain Of Thought

protocol_version.description: Schema version. Bump via ADR; never edit messages in place.
protocol_version.title: Protocol Version

title: Message
